$comment: Performance budgets — CI-enforced, gzip bytes. Failing any budget fails the build. Headroom is deliberate but finite; raising a budget requires a justification in the PR.

asyncChunkGzipExceptions.$comment: physics = rapier2d wasm chunk (scroll-gated, one-world-ahead). Everything else obeys the default.

requiredStrings.$comment: reduced-motion / no-JS parity: these must exist in the prerendered HTML regardless of any script running.
